prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild library, Natsu Ashbell in reinforced leather armor and Natsu Ironleaf in cream and mint robes; Natsu Ashbell leans over an ancient parchment map spread across a wooden table, pointing at a specific location, while Natsu Ironleaf stands beside her holding a glowing mana crystal, carefully positioning it to illuminate hidden ink markings on the map, cinematic lighting, consistent character design, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild library shot; Natsu Ashbell traces the route on the map with her finger, nodding in realization, while Natsu Ironleaf smiles and gently shifts her grip on the glowing crystal to steady the light for further study, maintaining consistent character positions, camera angle, and mood, no text, no watermark.
